title: Weakness
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports sudden, progressive, fluctuating, unilateral, symmetrical, sensory-associated, and back-pain-associated weakness, urgent referral, and clinician-led imaging where specified.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped adult weakness identity, onset, distribution, progression, fluctuation, sensory, speech, pain, acute or rapidly progressive red flags, bowel or bladder context, imaging, safety, and referral fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports sudden, progressive, fluctuating, unilateral, symmetrical, sensory-associated, and back-pain-associated weakness, urgent referral, and clinician-led imaging where specified.

source.title: Suspected neurological conditions: recognition and referral

source_limitations: People aged 16 years or younger are outside the exact source.

Vision and functional-impact fields, all broad assessed negatives, detailed neurological examination prompts, sensory-level and headache-with-deficit wording, blood tests, prior notes, generic plans, and fixed or generic follow-up remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, imaging selection or interpretation, emergency disposition, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
